display_name.description: A folder’s display name must be unique amongst its siblings, e.g. no two folders with the same parent can share the same display name. The display name must start and end with a letter or digit, may contain letters, digits, spaces, hyphens and underscores and can be no longer than 30 characters.

parent.description: Must be of the form `folders/{folder_id}` or `organizations/{org_id}`.
